heroSubtitle: Traditional South Indian snacks made with uncompromising quality. No palm oil, just pure butter and cold-pressed oils.
checkoutGreeting: Hi Vishwasa, I would like to place an order for the following snacks:
deliveryWarning: Please enter your name and delivery address to continue.
contactAddress: 123 Traditional Street, J.P. Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
footerAbout: Mother's Trust, Nature's Best. We craft traditional recipes using premium ingredients, absolutely no palm oil, and 100% cold-pressed oils.
aboutText:
Vishwasa was born out of a simple desire: to bring back the authentic taste of our grandmothers' kitchens. 
In a world filled with mass-produced snacks using cheap palm oil and artificial preservatives, we decided to take a step back to our roots.
aboutFeature1Desc: Every batch is prepared with the exact same care and ingredients we use for our own family.
aboutFeature2Desc: 0% Palm Oil. 0% Artificial Colors. We strictly use pure butter, desi ghee, and local cold-pressed oils.
aboutFeature3Desc: Following generations-old traditional recipes that capture the true essence of South India.
feature1Desc: Absolutely zero palm oil in any of our products.
feature2Desc: Made exclusively using groundnut and sesame cold pressed oils.
feature3Desc: Authentic recipes made rich and melt-in-mouth with pure butter.
howToOrderSubtext: No complicated checkout. Add snacks, fill your details, and confirm on WhatsApp. Done.
step1Desc: Browse our collection and add your favourites. Minimum order is ₹240 — usually 2 packs.
step2Desc: Fill in your name and full delivery address in the cart. We deliver pan-India.
step3Desc: Tap the WhatsApp button. We confirm your order and dispatch within 1-2 business days.
storyHeading: Made the way it used to be
comboSubtext: Pick any 2 packs to place an order — minimum ₹240, delivered to your door.
bulkSubtext: We offer bulk pricing and custom packaging for corporate gifting, office snack boxes, and festive hampers. Minimum 10 packs.
ctaSubtext: No preservatives. No palm oil. Just honest snacks.
deliveryInfo: Shipped via India Post · Delivered in 5–7 business days
seoDescription: Mother's Trust, Nature's Best. Traditional recipes made with better ingredients, no palm oil, and cold-pressed oils.
